text: I feel a gentle sense of curiosity and anticipation in this environment. The glass walls and open layout of the meeting room create a sense of transparency, inviting reflection on the boundaries between private thought and public discourse. Moving into the next space, vibrant colors and bold declarations of R+D (Research and Development) inspire me—a philosopher—in a different way, calling me to contemplate how knowledge is shaped and shared. Surrounded by exhibits that celebrate inquiry, I feel caught between the immediacy of lived experience and the alluring abstraction of theory. There is an energy of creative possibility here, and I am eager to immerse myself in both the questions and connections that this place offers.
